title: mentha × nepetoides subsp. ayassei
intro: Mentha × nepetoides subsp. ayassei, also known as Ayasse's peppermint, is a subspecies of the hybrid mint plant that is native to the Mediterranean region. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and digestive-aiding properties. The health benefits of Mentha × nepetoides subsp. ayassei include relief from indigestion, nausea, and headaches, as well as its ability to freshen breath and reduce stress. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
